basics.name: Abhinav Khanna
basics.summary: B.Tech Computer Science student at IIT Delhi working on machine learning, robotics, AI safety, systems, and vision-language models. U.S. Citizen.

work.name: SRI International
work.summary: Fine-tuned large language models for portfolio management using DPO and GRPO, introduced risk-sensitive behavior through preference orderings, and extended the approach with model ensembles.

work.name: Wipro AI, Lab45
work.summary: Developed deep learning and NLP systems for insurance claim processing, including claim classification, claim-validity prediction, and RAG integration.

portfolio.name: Semantic Safety Aware Planning
portfolio.description: Hierarchical VLM and DWA planning for semantically safe navigation in uncertain environments; undergraduate thesis linked.

portfolio.name: Counterfactual Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
portfolio.description: A dataset and benchmark for evaluating VLA models on counterfactual reasoning tasks.

portfolio.name: HindiLM
portfolio.description: A byte-level BPE tokenizer and decoder-only Hindi language model built from basic PyTorch modules. Code available on GitHub.

portfolio.name: Object Clearance Planner
portfolio.description: PyBullet control for Franka Emika pick-and-place operations on irregular objects.

portfolio.name: Backdoor Attacks on Open-Vocabulary Object Detectors
portfolio.description: A robustness study of Grounding DINO under image-space prompt-tuning triggers.

portfolio.name: Linux Kernel Development
portfolio.description: A gang scheduling class and block device driver with caching and write monitoring.

portfolio.name: Anamorphic Encryption
portfolio.description: A systematization of knowledge for cryptographic schemes under violated sender-freedom and receiver-privacy assumptions.
